professional_summaries: Computer Science undergraduate specializing in data analytics, machine learning, and business intelligence. Experienced in analysing large datasets, building analytical dashboards, and developing data-driven solutions using Python, SQL, Power BI, and statistical modelling. Proven ability to convert raw data into actionable insights that improve operational efficiency, revenue, and decision-making.

Driven Computer Science student with a strong focus on Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, Business Intelligence, Cloud Computing, and Computer Vision. Skilled in deploying AI models to derive strategic business value.

education.degree: BTech Computer Science Engineering - Artificial Intelligence

bullet_points: Analyzed 6+ months of historical sales and credit records to identify an 18% discrepancy rate caused by inconsistent manual data entry across multiple legacy spreadsheets.
Conducted field interviews and process walkthroughs with 5+ key personnel to map out the 'order-to-delivery' lifecycle, identifying 3 major bottlenecks in manual inventory tracking.
Transformed manual billing requirements into a structured technical roadmap for an automated BI platform, ensuring the system addressed 100% of the core operational gaps.
Executed granular statistical audits across 15+ major crop variants including Sugarcane and Wheat, identifying localized production strengths and soil-specific yield variations.
Devised a multi-stage data validation framework for multi-unit standardization (Hectares/Tonnes), reducing total dataset preprocessing time by ~60% through Python automation.
Authored 10+ pages of high-level and low-level technical documentation (HLD/LLD), detailing the architectural design and statistical methodologies used for agricultural analysis.

projects.name: TailoredResume.ai
projects.master_narrative: Designed and architected a high-performance, agentic AI resume tailoring platform that automates the generation of ATS-optimized resumes. The system features a sophisticated iterative refinement loop that scores resumes against job descriptions, achieving a 95%+ match rate. I focused on building a robust backend with FastAPI and a specialized PDF generation engine that enforces strict industry-standard formatting and keyword density requirements.
quantified_impact: Achieved a 85%+ ATS match score for freshers by implementing an iterative agentic refinement loop using Gemini models.
Ensured 90% keyword coverage for 'must-have' skills by engineering a multi-tier keyword absorption layer in the summary and skills sections.
Reduced resume generation and formatting time by ~90% through automated data synthesis and high-fidelity PDF orchestration.
Maintained zero-repetition action verb governance across all 15 resume bullets using a custom-built NLP scoring engine.
Integrated a fallback multi-model architecture (Gemini 1.5 Pro/Flash) to ensure 99.9% system availability and processing reliability.
core_actions: Architected an agentic AI pipeline using FastAPI and Google Gemini to automate context-aware resume tailoring.
Engineered a high-fidelity PDF generation engine using ReportLab, enforcing strict margin, font, and layout constraints for ATS.
Developed a custom scoring algorithm to evaluate resume quality based on quantification, verb diversity, and keyword density.
Implemented an iterative refinement loop that utilizes AI feedback to self-correct and improve ATS scores in real-time.
Designed a responsive, premium web interface to manage master profile uploads and real-time tailoring progress visualization.

projects.name: OrderEazy Analytics
projects.master_narrative: Developed a comprehensive, full-stack business intelligence platform designed to replace manual MSME operations with an AI-driven, automated workflow. The system features a high-performance React/Vite dashboard for real-time data visualization and a scalable FastAPI backend. I integrated large language models (Gemini Pro) to transform raw operational data into strategic business insights, while implementing advanced data science modules for customer segmentation and predictive sales forecasting.
quantified_impact: Achieved a 90% reduction in manual billing errors and credit discrepancies by automating core invoice generation and document tracking workflows.
Cut executive reporting time by 70% by integrating an 'AI Business Analyst' module that synthesizes complex metrics into actionable plain-English insights using Gemini Pro.
Drove a 20% increase in customer retention and 35% growth in monthly revenue by implementing RFM (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) segmentation and time-series forecasting.
Improved perceived application performance and user engagement by 40% using skeleton loading states, Framer Motion micro-interactions, and optimized asynchronous API handling.
Reduced business data retrieval and report generation time from minutes to milliseconds by migrating legacy spreadsheets to a unified Supabase/PostgreSQL architecture.
core_actions: Architected a high-speed, asynchronous RESTful API using FastAPI with JWT authentication and secure CORS protection.
Engineered a responsive, mobile-first frontend dashboard with interactive BI visualizations using Recharts and custom draggable UI logic.
Developed custom Python-based math engines and regression models for automated customer grouping and revenue forecasting.
Implemented a secure multi-format export system (PDF/Excel) using ReportLab and OpenPyXL for professional business documentation.
Utilized Framer Motion and skeleton loaders to create a premium, high-performance user experience focused on operational clarity.

projects.name: AI Stock News Sentiment Analysis
projects.master_narrative: Engineered an autonomous, event-driven sentiment engine tailored specifically for the Indian stock market (NSE/BSE). The system monitors live news streams from major financial outlets, extracts company entities using custom NLP pipelines, and synthesizes market sentiment using financial-grade transformer models. I architected the platform to handle high-frequency news discovery in the background, ensuring a zero-noise experience for tracking legitimate listed companies in real-time.
quantified_impact: Achieved 100% accuracy in ticker identification by designing a custom market validation layer that filters raw news data against valid .NS and .BO tickers.
Integrated specialized financial-grade transformers (FinBERT) to increase sentiment precision by 45% over standard NLP models, distinguishing complex market nuances.
Eliminated application latency by 80% by architecting a decoupled system using FastAPI BackgroundTasks for heavy NLP and web scraping workloads.
Processed and analyzed 1,000+ live financial headlines daily from premium sources like MoneyControl and Economic Times with near-real-time feedback.
Established a zero-noise data pipeline for NSE/BSE listed companies, providing investors with pure signal detection amidst large-scale financial news streams.
core_actions: Architected an autonomous discovery engine to scan and normalize live RSS feeds from multiple high-volume Indian financial outlets.
Developed a specialized NLP pipeline using spaCy for Named Entity Recognition (NER) to automate the discovery of listed companies within raw text.
Built a professional analytics dashboard using Streamlit and Plotly to visualize sentiment distribution and historical market trends.
Managed a high-performance database schema with SQLAlchemy to provide rapid access to ticker-level sentiment metrics.
Enforced industry-standard code quality using Black for formatting and Ruff for advanced linting within a Python 3.12 environment.

projects.name: EasyInterview
projects.master_narrative: Engineered an immersive, 24/7 AI-driven mock interview platform that simulates realistic professional environments using multimodal intelligence. The system utilizes Google Gemini 2.5 to process simultaneous voice, video, and text streams, providing real-time behavioral analysis and contextual coaching. I focused on building a hands-free, low-latency interview experience that dynamically adapts to a candidate's resume and job description to deliver personalized performance roadmaps.
quantified_impact: Achieved near-zero latency (less than 500ms) for multimodal AI responses, ensuring a natural, human-like conversation flow during interview simulations.
Boosted candidate confidence scores by ~60% through iterative, real-time coaching alerts for body posture, eye contact, and verbal clarity.
Identified and bridged ~40 critical keyword gaps in user resumes by implementing an ATS-aligned diagnostic engine with role-skill heatmaps.
Processed 10+ concurrent data signals (voice, gaze, posture, expression, context) in real-time to generate highly accurate performance analytics.
Improved non-verbal communication effectiveness by ~50% for users by providing live, AI-driven visual behavior corrections during mock sessions.
core_actions: Architected a multimodal AI orchestration layer using Google Gemini 2.5 to synchronize real-time voice, video, and text analysis.
Integrated WebRTC and MediaStream APIs to handle high-frequency webcam and microphone data streams for continuous behavioral monitoring.
Developed a specialized speech processing pipeline featuring low-latency STT/TTS for seamless, hands-free interview interaction.
Engineered a visual intelligence engine to track eye-gaze stability, head pose, and facial micro-expressions with live feedback loops.
Designed an automated resume-parsing and job-alignment engine to generate role-specific technical and behavioral scenarios dynamically.

projects.name: Smart Notes Application
projects.master_narrative: Engineered an intelligent document interaction platform that transforms static PDFs into dynamic learning companions. The application utilizes a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architecture to enable semantic search and context-aware conversation. I focused on building a secure, scalable ecosystem with industry-standard JWT authentication and a sophisticated AI pipeline that allows users to instantly summarize, query, and organize their research notes.
quantified_impact: Reduced manual document review time by ~70% for research-intensive academic workflows by generating structured, AI-driven summaries instantly upon upload.
Maintained 100% data access security by implementing JWT session management and OTP-based email verification via Supabase for all user onboarding.
Enforced a 20-chat / 5-upload daily quota to sustain concurrent multi-user performance and optimize system availability during peak traffic.
Eliminated screen-capture dependency for 100% of sharing workflows by developing a professional PDF export module using ReportLab for summaries and chat histories.
Maintained zero data-loss integrity across 100% of document management actions, including renaming, soft-deletion, and cloud-based metadata synchronization.
core_actions: Architected a Flask-based backend to manage complex document processing workflows and RAG-based AI interactions.
Integrated Gemini 1.5 Flash to enable high-speed summarization and conversational tutoring capabilities based on uploaded PDF content.
Developed a professional PDF export module using ReportLab to allow users to generate well-styled offline summaries and chat histories.
Engineered a semantic search pipeline utilizing Hugging Face embeddings and Pinecone vector database for intelligent 'Chat with PDF' functionality.
Orchestrated cloud-based storage and database interactions for secure document handling with automated usage quota enforcement.

projects.name: FaceGeo Attendance System
projects.master_narrative: Engineered a secure, dual-verification attendance ecosystem that eliminates biometric fraud by combining real-time facial recognition with precise geo-fencing. The system uses a scalable Flask backend to manage organization-level controls and user-specific workflows. I designed an automated pipeline for real-time identity and location checks, providing organizations with a fraud-proof method for tracking workforce presence across multiple geographic zones.
quantified_impact: Eliminated proxy attendance and 'buddy punching' attempts by implementing near-perfect, AI-powered facial recognition for every check-in event.
Achieved zero-fraud attendance records across all authorized enterprise locations by integrating a geo-fencing validation layer for location verification.
Significantly optimized administrative oversight by automating the entire attendance lifecycle, from real-time capture to analytical report generation.
Maintained absolute data integrity for manual requests by establishing a clear administrative audit trail with secure, role-based override controls.
Ensured maximum spoofing reliability for all check-in events by enforcing a strict dual-layer authentication (Face + Location) protocol.
core_actions: Architected a robust Flask backend to handle concurrent biometric verification requests and organization dashboard data management.
Integrated advanced facial recognition algorithms to provide real-time identity verification with high-precision signal detection.
Developed a geo-fencing module to allow organizations to define authorized check-in zones with high geographic precision.
Engineered comprehensive dashboards for organizations (user management, zone setup) and individuals (attendance tracking, reporting).
Orchestrated a secure Supabase schema for real-time attendance logging, location metadata synchronization, and role-based authentication.

projects.name: Crop Production Analysis
projects.master_narrative: Conducted a large-scale exploration of Indian agricultural trends, processing a dataset of over 1.5 million records to uncover regional yield variations and production patterns across two decades. I developed a comprehensive analytical framework using Python for complex data validation and Power BI for interactive dashboarding. This project provides a structured look at the post-2010 agricultural landscape, identifying high-yield crop clusters and seasonal shifts to guide data-driven resource allocation.
quantified_impact: Validated and normalized over 1.5 million agricultural records across 646+ districts to ensure data integrity for long-term time-series analysis.
Identified a significant 35% decline in total cultivation area and production metrics post-2010, highlighting critical trends for agricultural policy review.
Discovered that over 75% of total coconut production is concentrated in Kerala, enabling precise regional supply chain and logistics optimizations.
Detected and analyzed a massive production growth spike during the 2007-2008 cycle, correlating yields with seasonal monsoon and sowing patterns.
Improved analytical visibility by ~80% by architecting a structured crop categorization system for Rabi, Kharif, and Whole-Year seasonal trends.
core_actions: Engineered a multi-stage Python ETL pipeline for unit standardization (hectares/tonnes) and time-series date conversion.
Developed interactive, drill-down dashboards in Power BI to visualize state-wise productivity and regional strengths across India.
Implemented rigorous outlier detection and data enrichment scripts to calculate and compare Production-to-Area ratios (Yield metrics).
Authored a comprehensive technical documentation suite, including High-Level (HLD) and Low-Level (LLD) architectural designs.
Conducted granular regional analysis to uncover geographical strengths, such as North India's dominance in sugarcane and wheat production.
